current_milestone: Phase G.2 (The Commons) complete — subscribe/drain + consensus merge verified
notes: Phase G.2 end-to-end verified. commons_swarm demo runs three agents + one subscriber against a shared weavory, drains 3 queued beliefs, detects 1 conflict group with 3 variants, consensus picks X=42 (alice+bob trust outweighs mallet), lww picks X=0 (latest recorded_at). gate_commons.sh 5/5 green.
